The '''Rout of Hensara''' was a battle fought by a small [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] force to recover the [[Battle of Yavin (starship)|''Battle of Yavin'']] from [[Hensara III]].

The [[Battle of Yavin (starship)|''Battle of Yavin'']] had been forced to crash on Hensara III to escape the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Havoc (Strike-class)|''Havoc'']]. The ''Havoc'' landed an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] and some [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to locate and capture the ship and its crew, then withdrew from the system. This gave the New Republic a window of opportunity to recover the frigate. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Eridain]]'', and the [[Baudo-class star yacht|''Baudo''-class yacht]] ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' entered the system, and two flights of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] entered Hensara III's atmosphere while the remaining four fighters remained in orbit to patrol for Imperial forces.

The ''Havoc'' then re-entered the system, its configuration altered to carry three [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons. It launched 24 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], 6 [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]], and 6 [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], with the bombers being sent to destroy the ''Battle of Yavin'' on the ground. The ensuing battle went very poorly for the Imperial pilots, with only two of them managing to survive. The Imperial ground forces were also wiped out. The ''Pulsar Skate'' recovered the ''Battle of Yavin''{{'s}} crew, and the ''Havoc'' fled the system.
